---
title: "R 조건문 Conditional execution"
author:
  - name: Bohak Maeng
    url: https://manboha.github.io
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


## if 문


## ifelse 문


## switch 문



## which() 문


## return 문
